CommercialStructure_Question_AABCode_A.tooltip: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. Indicates the response to the question, "Does applicant have a heating or processing boiler?".

CommercialStructure_Question_AABInspecti.tooltip: Enter date: The date of the last inspection.

OtherInsurance_InsurerFullName_A.tooltip: Enter text: The insurer name on any other applicable insurance. As used here, this is the current carrier for boiler and machinery coverage.

CommercialStructure_Question_AADCode_A.tooltip: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. Indicates the response to the question, "Any specialized equipment, such as medical equipment or other, valued over $100,000?".

CommercialStructure_AnySpecializedEquipm.tooltip: Enter text: An explanation of an specialized equipment, such as medical equipment or other, valued over $100,000.

CommercialStructure_Question_AACCode_A.tooltip: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. Indicates the response to the question, "Is all equipment inspected annually and well maintained?".

CommercialStructure_Question_KACCode_A.tooltip: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. Indicates the response to the question, "Is there a swimming pool on the premises?".

SwimmingPool_ApprovedFenceIndicator_A.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the swimming pool is surrounded by a fence that is an approved height.

SwimmingPool_LimitedAccessIndicator_A.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates there is limited access to the swimming pool.

SwimmingPool_DivingBoardIndicator_A.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the swimming pool has a diving board.

SwimmingPool_SlideIndicator_A.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the swimming pool has a slide.

SwimmingPool_AboveGroundIndicator_A.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the swimming pool is above ground.

SwimmingPool_InGroundIndicator_A.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the swimming pool is in the ground.

SwimmingPool_LifeGuardIndicator_A.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates there is life guard for the swimming pool.

CommercialStructure_Question_KADCode_A.tooltip: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. Indicates the response to the question, "Is the building under construction?".

CommercialStructure_BuildingUnderConstru.tooltip: Enter text: An explanation as to whether the building is under construction.

CommercialStructure_Question_AAGCode_A.tooltip: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. Indicates the response to the question, "Is there a playground on premises?".

CommercialStructure_PlaygroundOnPremises.tooltip: Enter text: An explanation as to whether there is a playground on premises.

CommercialStructure_Wiring_AluminiumCode.tooltip: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. Indicates if aluminum wiring is used in the structure.

BuildingImprovement_WiringInstallationDa.tooltip: Enter date: The date the wiring was installed.

CommercialStructure_AluminiumWireUseDesc.tooltip: Enter text: The description of any aluminum wire used.

CommercialStructure_Question_AAFCode_A.tooltip: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. Indicates the response to the question, "Is developer or contractor a board member?".

CommercialStructure_Question_AAECode_A.tooltip: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. Indicates the response to the question, "Is a property manager employed?".

Construction_CoverageToWalls_BareIndicat.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates coverage applies to bare walls.

Construction_CoverageToWalls_FinishedInd.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates coverage applies to finished walls.

Alarm_Smoke_NoneIndicator_A.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates there are no smoke detectors in each unit.

Alarm_Smoke_BatteryIndicator_A.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the smoke detector is battery operated.

Alarm_Smoke_WiredIndicator_A.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the smoke detector is wired.

BuildingFireProtection_FireDivisionCount.tooltip: Enter number: The number of fire divisions in the building.

BuildingFireProtection_FireDivisionUnitC.tooltip: Enter number: The number of units within a fire division.

CommercialStructure_OwnerOccupiedUnitCou.tooltip: Enter number: The number of units that are owner occupied.

Alarm_AlarmType_HoldUpIndicator_A.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the alarm type is a hold-up alarm.  A manual or semiautomatic control which can transmit an alarm in the event of a hold-up. As used here, complete this section in regards to the location and protection systems for this risk. Information on the classification of safes, vaults and alarm systems can be found in the Crime Section of the ISO Commercial Lines Manual.

Alarm_AlarmType_PremisesIndicator_A.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the alarm type is a premises alarm.  A sensing device installed on premises which transmits an alarm in the event of unauthorized entry. The Premises Extent must be completed for Premises Alarms.

Alarm_AlarmType_SafeIndicator_A.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the alarm type is a safe / vault alarm.  A system that protects the safe or vault and is connected to an outside central station, gong or siren. The Extent of Protection for safe / vault must be completed.

Alarm_AlarmType_OtherIndicator_A.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the alarm type is other than those listed.

Alarm_AlarmType_AlarmDescription_A.tooltip: Enter text: The description of the type of alarm.

Alarm_Burglar_LocalGongIndicator_A.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the burglar alarm sounds or appears outside the premises.

Alarm_Burglar_WithKeysIndicator_A.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the alarm company, located off the insured's premises, has keys to the applicant's property.

Alarm_Burglar_CentralStationIndicator_A.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the burglar alarm rings at an alarm company.

Alarm_Burglar_PoliceConnectIndicator_A.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates if alarms (hold-up and burglar) are transmitted to police headquarters rather than to a private control station

Alarm_Burglar_GradeCode_A.tooltip: Enter code: The alarm system grade as described in the Underwriters Laboratories (UL) standard (i.e., AA, A, BB, B, CC and C) which indicates the time required to respond to a signal from the alarm system.

Alarm_Burglar_ProtectionExtentSafeVaultP.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the extent of protection for the safe / vault is partial and covers around the door only.

Alarm_Burglar_ProtectionExtentSafeVaultC.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the extent of protection for the safe / vault is complete and covers the sides, top walls, floor and ceiling.

Alarm_Burglar_ProtectionExtentPremisesOn.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the extent of protection for the premises is protection grade 1 as defined in the Underwriters Laboratories (UL) standard.

Alarm_Burglar_ProtectionExtentPremisesTw.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the extent of protection for the premises is protection grade 2 as defined in the Underwriters Laboratories (UL) standard.

Alarm_Burglar_ProtectionExtentPremisesTh.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the extent of protection for the premises is protection grade 3 as defined in the Underwriters Laboratories (UL) standard.

Alarm_Burglar_CertificateIdentifier_A.tooltip: Enter identifier: The Underwriters Laboratories or other testing organization Certificate Number, if applicable. Attach a copy of the certificate to the application.

Alarm_Burglar_CertificateExpirationDate_.tooltip: Enter date: The expiration date of the certificate.  (MM/DD/YYYY)

SafeVault_ManufacturerFullName_A.tooltip: Enter text: The safe or vault manufacturer's name.

SafeVault_Label_ULIndicator_A.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the rating is based on Underwriters Laboratories, Inc. (UL).

SafeVault_Label_SMNAIndicator_A.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the rating is based on Safe Manufacturers National Association (SMNA).

SafeVault_ClassCode_A.tooltip: Enter code: The construction classification representing the extent of burglary protection for this safe or vault. Use the classification from the Burglary label and not the Fire label located on the safe or vault. For industry definitions of the classifications, refer to the Commercial Lines Manual.

CrimeMoneyAndSecurities_MoneyOnPremisesA.tooltip: Enter amount: The maximum amount of cash kept on the premises during normal business hours.

CrimeMoneyAndSecurities_MoneyWithMesseng.tooltip: Enter amount: The maximum amount of cash messengers are allowed to carry for the applicant.

CrimeMoneyAndSecurities_MoneyOvernightAm.tooltip: Enter amount: The maximum exposure amount for money overnight.

CrimeInformation_DepositFrequencyCode_A.tooltip: Enter code: The frequency of deposits.

BuildingProtection_DoubleCylinderDoorLoc.tooltip: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. Indicates the type of locks on the entry doors of the insured premises are double cylinder deadbolt door locks.

SafeVault_ConstructionDescription_A.tooltip: Enter text: The construction of the safe, vault or other receptacle (e.g., 4-inch steel door, with 12-inch reinforced stone walls).

BuildingSecurity_OtherProtectionDescript.tooltip: Enter text: The description of other protective measures or devices (e.g., if windows have steel grates and are connected to an alarm). Indicate if the building has skylights and if windows are visible from the street.

BusinessOwnersLineOfBusiness_RemarkText_.tooltip: Enter text: The description of any additional information required for underwriting or rating the business owners line of business.  ACORD 101, Additional Remarks Schedule, may be attached if more space is required.

Producer_AuthorizedRepresentative_Signat.tooltip: Sign here: Accommodates the signature of the authorized representative (e.g., producer, agent, broker, etc.) of the company(ies) listed on the document.  This is required in most states.

Producer_AuthorizedRepresentative_FullNa.tooltip: Enter text: The name of the authorized representative of the producer, agency and/or broker that signed the form.

Producer_StateLicenseIdentifier_A.tooltip: Enter identifier: The State License Number of the producer.

NamedInsured_Signature_A.tooltip: Sign here: Accommodates the signature of the applicant or named insured.

NamedInsured_SignatureDate_A.tooltip: Enter date: The date the form was signed by the applicant or named insured.  (MM/DD/YYYY)

Producer_NationalIdentifier_A.tooltip: Enter identifier: The National Producer Number (NPN) as defined in the National Insurance Producer Registry (NIPR).  Note: The NPN is not the same as the producer state license number.
